title: Amtech L3352 49 Piece Colour Coded bit Set
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: VERSATILE: This handy bit set includes a useful assortment of Pozi, Phillips and slotted bits, colour coded for easy selection
RATCHET INCLUDED: It is supplied with a mini ratchet spanner and is comes in a sturdy storage case
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.

specifications_table.Style: ‎12 x PH; 6 x SL; 12 x PZ; 7 x Torx; 11x Hex, 1 x spanner;
specifications_table.Compatible fastener range: ‎This bit set is compatible with slotted, Phillips, Pozi, Torx, hex, and security hex fasteners of various sizes as specified in the product details.
